name: Two Brines for Smoking Fish
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------BRINE #2----------------------------------
4 cups Water
1 cup Salt (regular or curing salt)
1 cup Rock salt
2 cups Brown sugar
Flavorings: Rub flavorings such as garlic, shallots, tarragon, dill, thyme, or your choice directly onto the fish before placing it in the smoker. You may also add flavorings to either of the brines.
After brining with the flavored brine, remove the fish and rinse off any remaining salt. Dry thoroughly before smoking.
Smoked fish will keep for a year or longer when stored properly in airtight plastic bags with excess air removed.
